description_text: This listing is for 4 pieces (2 L & 2 R) 100% Brand New & High Quality Front Bumper Canards Splitters. It can give you a very sport looking, but also can protect your front side bumper from scratches or small bump damages. Give your vehicle a nice aggressive and affordable sporty look by adding this front bumper canard. UV-Protected Coating, 100% Weather Proof. Feature: Quantity: 4Pcs Color: Glossy Carbon Fiber Material: ABS & Carbon fiber Pattern Fitment: Universal fit most of cars Size: As the pictures shown Package Included: 2 small & 2 big canards and installation hardware
